name: Agent Team — Daily Triage
description: Cron 8:00 AM daily. Watches FINDINGS.md changes, regenerates QUEUE.md (via local agent triage.mjs trigger), notifies Sebastián that queue is ready.

parameters.body:
FINDINGS.md updated since last triage.

Run locally: claude → 'vezmi další task z queue'.

QUEUE.md head: see https://github.com/Spookybro55/autosmartweby/blob/main/docs/agents/QUEUE.md

_setup_notes: REQUIRES: Make GitHub connection (PAT s repo scope).
REPLACE: TODO_SEBASTIAN_TOPIC with your ntfy topic name (~14-char random suffix).
OPTIONAL: install ntfy iOS/Android app, subscribe to topic.
TEST: Make UI 'Run once' button → notification should arrive in seconds.
OPS estimate: ~30/měs (1× per day if FINDINGS unchanged, more if changes detected).
